overview.minides: The most capable and connected Defender ever — with Terrain Response 2, 900 mm water wading, configurable air suspension, and the monstrous Octa variant.
overview.description: The Land Rover Defender (L663) is available in India in three body styles — 90 (3-door), 110 (5-door), and 130 (5-door extended) — and 15 variants spanning five powertrain options. The 2025 update brings revised interior materials, Pivi Pro Gen 2 software, improved NVH, and the new Defender Octa (launched March 2025 at ₹2.59 Cr) with a 4.4L twin-turbo V8 mild hybrid (635 PS / 750 Nm). All variants share full-time AWD with an electronic air suspension, Terrain Response 2, twin-speed transfer box with low range, 900 mm water wading depth, and up to 3,500 kg towing capacity.

dimensions.groundClearance: 226 mm (standard) / up to 294 mm (air suspension raised)

suspension.front: Independent double wishbone with electronic air suspension
suspension.rear: Independent integral link with electronic air suspension
suspension.additionalTech: Terrain Response 2 with Auto mode; 5-height air suspension (Access / Low / Standard / High / Extended Off-Road); Hydraulic Body Motion Control (Octa)

sharedSpecs.platform: D7x Aluminium Monocoque (Land Rover IIIA platform)
